skill_purpose: Demonstrate polite multi-phase dialogue for abd-skill-builder standards and structural checks.
target_audience: abd-skill-builder tests and humans learning the fixture layout.
validation_expectations: compileall on scripts/, scripts/base/build.py, scanners including rule_scanner_bindings.
rules_and_scanners: rules/*.md bound via rules/scanners.json to scanner_greet_warm and scanner_close_graceful.
notes: Reference skill for layout and build.py validation in abd-skill-builder.
